LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_MH_3_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Not at all 
1 = A little bit 
2 = Somewhat 
3 = Quite a bit 
4 = Very much

COMMENT: Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening.
